title: paspalum planum
intro: Paspalum planum, also known as dwarf paspalum or button paspalum, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat wounds, skin irritations, and other infections. The health benefits of Paspalum planum include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Paspalum planum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
